title: Vanilla Backport x Fresh Animations
description: Adds Fresh Animations to the Happy Ghast in Vanilla Backport
body:
# ⚠️ Update – 02.02.26
This resource pack is less useful as of [Vanilla Backport v1.1.5.2](https://modrinth.com/mod/vanillabackport/version/1.1.5.2), where *Freshly Animated*, which is a built-in resource pack to add support to Fresh Animations along with mobs added by Vanilla Backport, has been added.

---
# ❗ Requires Fresh Animations
* **Currently only works with Fresh Animations v1.10.0 and beyond**
* This pack will not work properly unless [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) is present.
## Description
This pack adds compatibility between [Blackgear](https://modrinth.com/user/ItsBlackgear)'s [Vanilla Backport](https://modrinth.com/mod/vanillabackport) and [FreshLX](https://modrinth.com/user/FreshLX)'s [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations)
## Load Order
This pack goes above Fresh Animations. It will not work properly if below.

![Load Order](https://i.imgur.com/FwN0OAL.png)

### EMF and OptiFine
This section is grabbed (and edited) from [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations)'s page, go check it for more information.

![Optifine or EMF Required](https://imgur.com/h2JOFrT.png)
Fresh Animations (and this) uses an OptiFine feature called custom entity models (CEM) to add new models and animations.

**THE PACK(S) WILL NOT WORK PROPERLY WITHOUT THIS FEATURE!**

As an alternative to OptiFine, the combination of [Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) and [Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) can be used for CEM features.
